title: Senior Drivers - Age 65 or Older | Texas DPS
service_category: Senior Drivers (65+ ID option; 79+ in-person renewal rules)
notes: Defines senior workflows: (1) 65+ may voluntarily surrender REAL ID DL/CDL and apply online for Texas ID via TxT; (2) 79+ must renew DL in person with age-based renewal period; includes office-visit steps, doc requirements, vision exam, and testing policy (no mandatory tests solely by age).
